name: Olive Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 cups chopped pitted black olives (1-1/4 pounds)
1 1/2 cups olive oil, plus additional oil to brush muffin tins
3 tablespoons chopped fresh mint, or 2 teaspoons crushed dried mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse olives and drain thoroughly.
3. Dry the olives on paper towels.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, grated onion, mint (fresh or crushed), sugar, and baking powder.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add olive oil. Mix until just combined.
6. Brush muffin cups with additional olive oil.
7. Dust each cup with flour.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Serve warm.
